deviations.description: The process model enforces that 'Administer Anaesthesia' occurs immediately after 'Prepare Patient', which is stricter than the new requirement in Version 2 that only requires anesthesia to follow patient preparation with flexible timing. The process exceeds the updated compliance requirement.

The change in activity labels from 'prepare_patient' and 'apply_anesthesia' to 'patient preparation' and 'anesthesia' does not affect compliance because the process model activities correspond directly to the new labels.
